name: Peanut Pie/Crisco
recipeInstructions:
1. For the crust, prepare and bake Crisco Single Crust. Cool completely. Heat oven to 350°F (180°C).
2. For the filling, combine granulated sugar, brown sugar, flour, cornstarch, and salt in a saucepan. Add milk and peanut butter chips gradually. Cook and stir on medium heat until the mixture comes to a boil and thickens. Reduce heat. Cook and stir for 2 minutes. Remove from heat.
3. Beat egg yolks lightly in a small bowl. Stir 1 cup of hot mixture slowly into yolks, mixing thoroughly. Return the mixture to the saucepan. Bring to a boil. Cook and stir on low heat for 2 minutes. Remove from heat. Stir in butter and vanilla. Pour the mixture into the baked pie crust.
4. Bake at 350°F (180°C) for 12 minutes. Sprinkle with chocolate-covered peanuts immediately. Cool to room temperature before serving. Refrigerate leftover pie.
